    "LEL reading is 13%, which exceeds the maximum allowable entry limit of 10% LEL."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Deny entry into the confined space.",
    "Ventilate the space to reduce combustible gas levels below 10% LEL.",
    "Re-test the atmosphere before authorizing entry."

  "rationale": "The 4-gas monitor shows an LEL (Lower Explosive Limit) reading of 13%. Under OSHA 1910.146, a hazardous atmosphere is defined as containing a concentration of flammable gas, vapor, or mist in excess of 10 percent of its LEL. Therefore, entry cannot be authorized.",

    "OSHA 1910.146(b) - Hazardous atmosphere definition"
  ]
